title: Batatas cissoides
intro: Batatas cissoides, also known as Wild Yam, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its health benefits include relieving menstrual cramps, nausea, and other symptoms associated with menopause, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health. The bioactive constituents of Batatas cissoides include diosgenin, a steroidal saponin with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as other alkaloids and glycosides. Wild Yam is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and creams, often combined with other herbs like black cohosh and red clover to support women's health.
